title: Nature's Breath
name: Wild Taiwanese Oolong
description: Nature’s Breath is a very rare treasure. It is a fully wild Taiwanese oolong made from lost Wuyi varietals in the north. The mature leaves were harvested from these trees, making the balls much bigger than most oolong tea. It was then masterfully roasted by one of our teachers Huang Chuan Fang. The energy is gloriously rich and bold, filling every crevice of the body. It feels like a breath of fresh air blowing from under the arms. Nature’s Breath tastes of berries, sour plum and rich minerals. It is excellent when prepared gongfu or leaves in a bowl.
